---
pagetitle: "Notes — Stats Beneath"
title: "Notes"
listing:
  id: notes-listing
  contents: notes
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 50
  categories: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

::: {.notes-page-header}
Observations on AI, learning, academia, and whatever else I notice at the intersection of technology and everyday life. Not always stats. Not always serious. Always honest.
:::
